data.description:
The execution core, deliberately kept thin.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] graphlib.static_order ordering; scripted + agent step dispatch; named output wiring forward.
- [ ] Burr-tripwire CI test scoped to executor.py ONLY (not the package), banning asyncio/concurrent.futures/threading/multiprocessing/retry libs.
- [ ] Carries the written Burr-adoption trigger list; executor state pre-shaped toward an immutable Burr-style State.
Files: src/rebar/llm/workflow/executor.py
data.title: WS-C2: Thin linear executor + Burr-tripwire CI test
